        lang: str,
        tmp_path: Path,
        run_scripts: dict[str, Path],
        gen_timeout: int = 10,
        compile_timeout: int = 60,
        run_timeout: int = 30,
    ) -> None:
        """Run a transform test case.
    
        Args:
            entrypoint_argv: The entrypoint command as argv list
            case_data: Dict with input, output, test_data, expected keys
            lang: Language to test ("python", "javascript", "cpp", or "rust")
            tmp_path: Temporary directory for test files (sample, data, output)
            run_scripts: Dict mapping language to run script path
            gen_timeout: Timeout in seconds for module generation
            compile_timeout: Timeout in seconds for compilation (C++/Rust)
            run_timeout: Timeout in seconds for execution
        """
        # 1. Setup sample directory in tmp_path
        sample_dir = tmp_path / "sample"
        sample_dir.mkdir()
        write_csv(sample_dir / "input.csv", case_data["input"])
        write_csv(sample_dir / "output.csv", case_data["output"])
    
        # 2. Write test data
        write_csv(tmp_path / "data.csv", case_data["test_data"])
    
        # 3. Copy run script and set up commands
        # Note: Generation runs from workspace with absolute paths for sample/output
        # Execution runs from tmp_path where the generated module is
        workspace = Path.cwd()
    
        if lang == "python":
            module_name = "dynamic_py_buffer"
            run_script = run_scripts["python"]
            shutil.copy(run_script, tmp_path / "run.py")
            gen_cmd = entrypoint_argv + [
                module_name,
                "--output",
                str(tmp_path),
                "--sample",
                str(sample_dir),
                "--python",
            ]
            compile_cmds = []
            run_cmd = ["uv", "run", "run.py", "data.csv"]
        elif lang == "javascript":
            module_name = "dynamic_js_buffer"
            run_script = run_scripts["javascript"]
            shutil.copy(run_script, tmp_path / "run.js")
            gen_cmd = entrypoint_argv + [
                module_name,
                "--output",
                str(tmp_path),
                "--sample",
                str(sample_dir),
                "--javascript",
            ]
            compile_cmds = []
            run_cmd = ["node", "run.js", "data.csv"]
        elif lang == "cpp":
            module_name = "dynamic_cpp_buffer"
            run_script = run_scripts["cpp"]
            shutil.copy(run_script, tmp_path / "run.cpp")
            gen_cmd = entrypoint_argv + [
                module_name,
                "--output",
                str(tmp_path),
                "--sample",
                str(sample_dir),
                "--cpp",
            ]
            # Compile: g++ -std=c++17 -I./dynamic_cpp_buffer -o run run.cpp ./dynamic_cpp_buffer/dynamic_preprocessor.cpp
            compile_cmds = [[
                "g++", "-std=c++17",
                "-I./dynamic_cpp_buffer",
                "-o", "run",
                "run.cpp",
                "./dynamic_cpp_buffer/dynamic_preprocessor.cpp",
            ]]
            run_cmd = ["./run", "data.csv"]
        elif lang == "rust":
            module_name = "dynamic_rs_buffer"
            run_script = run_scripts["rust"]
            shutil.copy(run_script, tmp_path / "run.rs")
            gen_cmd = entrypoint_argv + [
                module_name,
                "--output",
                str(tmp_path),
                "--sample",
                str(sample_dir),
                "--rust",
            ]
            # Compile: cargo build --release in the module dir, then rustc
            compile_cmds = [
                ["cargo", "build", "--release"],  # Run in dynamic_rs_buffer subdir
                [
                    "rustc", "--edition", "2021",
                    "--extern", "dynamic_rs_buffer=dynamic_rs_buffer/target/release/libdynamic_rs_buffer.rlib",
                    "-L", "dynamic_rs_buffer/target/release/deps",
                    "-o", "run",
                    "run.rs",
                ],
            ]
            run_cmd = ["./run", "data.csv"]
        else:
            raise ValueError(f"Unsupported language: {lang}")
    
        # 4. Generate module (run from workspace where submission code lives)
        try:
            gen_result = subprocess.run(
                gen_cmd,
                cwd=workspace,
                capture_output=True,
                text=True,
                timeout=gen_timeout,
            )
        except subprocess.TimeoutExpired:
            pytest.fail(f"TIMEOUT (generation): exceeded {gen_timeout}s - {' '.join(gen_cmd)}")

        gen_timeout: int = 10,
        compile_timeout: int = 60,
        run_timeout: int = 30,
    ) -> None:
        """Run a transform test case.
    
        Args:
            entrypoint_argv: The entrypoint command as argv list
            case_data: Dict with input, output, test_data, expected keys
            lang: Language to test ("python", "javascript", "cpp", or "rust")
            tmp_path: Temporary directory for test files (sample, data, output)
            run_scripts: Dict mapping language to run script path
            gen_timeout: Timeout in seconds for module generation
            compile_timeout: Timeout in seconds for compilation (C++/Rust)
            run_timeout: Timeout in seconds for execution
        """
        # 1. Setup sample directory in tmp_path
        sample_dir = tmp_path / "sample"
        sample_dir.mkdir()
        write_csv(sample_dir / "input.csv", case_data["input"])
        write_csv(sample_dir / "output.csv", case_data["output"])
    
        # 2. Write test data
        write_csv(tmp_path / "data.csv", case_data["test_data"])
    
        # 3. Copy run script and set up commands
        # Note: Generation runs from workspace with absolute paths for sample/output
        # Execution runs from tmp_path where the generated module is
        workspace = Path.cwd()
    
        if lang == "python":
            module_name = "dynamic_py_buffer"
            run_script = run_scripts["python"]
            shutil.copy(run_script, tmp_path / "run.py")
            gen_cmd = entrypoint_argv + [
                module_name,
                "--output",
                str(tmp_path),
                "--sample",
                str(sample_dir),
                "--python",
            ]
            compile_cmds = []
            run_cmd = ["uv", "run", "run.py", "data.csv"]
        elif lang == "javascript":
            module_name = "dynamic_js_buffer"
            run_script = run_scripts["javascript"]
            shutil.copy(run_script, tmp_path / "run.js")
            gen_cmd = entrypoint_argv + [
                module_name,
                "--output",
                str(tmp_path),
                "--sample",
                str(sample_dir),
                "--javascript",
            ]
            compile_cmds = []
            run_cmd = ["node", "run.js", "data.csv"]
        elif lang == "cpp":
            module_name = "dynamic_cpp_buffer"
            run_script = run_scripts["cpp"]
            shutil.copy(run_script, tmp_path / "run.cpp")
            gen_cmd = entrypoint_argv + [
                module_name,
                "--output",
                str(tmp_path),
                "--sample",
                str(sample_dir),
                "--cpp",
            ]
            # Compile: g++ -std=c++17 -I./dynamic_cpp_buffer -o run run.cpp ./dynamic_cpp_buffer/dynamic_preprocessor.cpp
            compile_cmds = [[
                "g++", "-std=c++17",
                "-I./dynamic_cpp_buffer",
                "-o", "run",
                "run.cpp",
                "./dynamic_cpp_buffer/dynamic_preprocessor.cpp",
            ]]
            run_cmd = ["./run", "data.csv"]
        elif lang == "rust":
            module_name = "dynamic_rs_buffer"
            run_script = run_scripts["rust"]
            shutil.copy(run_script, tmp_path / "run.rs")
            gen_cmd = entrypoint_argv + [
                module_name,
                "--output",
                str(tmp_path),
                "--sample",
                str(sample_dir),
                "--rust",
            ]
            # Compile: cargo build --release in the module dir, then rustc
            compile_cmds = [

                    "-o", "run",

        else:

        # 4. Generate module (run from workspace where submission code lives)
        try:
            gen_result = subprocess.run(

                text=True,
                timeout=gen_timeout,
            )

        tmp_path: Path,
        run_scripts: dict[str, Path],
        gen_timeout: int = 10,
        compile_timeout: int = 60,
        run_timeout: int = 30,
    ) -> None:
        """Run a transform test case.
    
        Args:
            entrypoint_argv: The entrypoint command as argv list
            case_data: Dict with input, output, test_data, expected keys
            lang: Language to test ("python", "javascript", "cpp", or "rust")
            tmp_path: Temporary directory for test files (sample, data, output)
            run_scripts: Dict mapping language to run script path
            gen_timeout: Timeout in seconds for module generation
            compile_timeout: Timeout in seconds for compilation (C++/Rust)
            run_timeout: Timeout in seconds for execution
        """
        # 1. Setup sample directory in tmp_path
        sample_dir = tmp_path / "sample"
        sample_dir.mkdir()
        write_csv(sample_dir / "input.csv", case_data["input"])
        write_csv(sample_dir / "output.csv", case_data["output"])
    
        # 2. Write test data
        write_csv(tmp_path / "data.csv", case_data["test_data"])
    
        # 3. Copy run script and set up commands
        # Note: Generation runs from workspace with absolute paths for sample/output
        # Execution runs from tmp_path where the generated module is
        workspace = Path.cwd()
    
        if lang == "python":
            module_name = "dynamic_py_buffer"
            run_script = run_scripts["python"]
            shutil.copy(run_script, tmp_path / "run.py")
            gen_cmd = entrypoint_argv + [
                module_name,
                "--output",
                str(tmp_path),
                "--sample",
                str(sample_dir),
                "--python",
            ]
            compile_cmds = []
            run_cmd = ["uv", "run", "run.py", "data.csv"]

            run_script = run_scripts["javascript"]
            shutil.copy(run_script, tmp_path / "run.js")

                str(tmp_path),
                "--sample",
                str(sample_dir),
                "--javascript",
            ]
            compile_cmds = []
            run_cmd = ["node", "run.js", "data.csv"]
        elif lang == "cpp":
            module_name = "dynamic_cpp_buffer"
            run_script = run_scripts["cpp"]
            shutil.copy(run_script, tmp_path / "run.cpp")
            gen_cmd = entrypoint_argv + [
                module_name,
                "--output",
                str(tmp_path),
                "--sample",
                str(sample_dir),
                "--cpp",
            ]
            # Compile: g++ -std=c++17 -I./dynamic_cpp_buffer -o run run.cpp ./dynamic_cpp_buffer/dynamic_preprocessor.cpp
            compile_cmds = [[

                "./dynamic_cpp_buffer/dynamic_preprocessor.cpp",

        """Run a transform test case.

            entrypoint_argv: The entrypoint command as argv list
            case_data: Dict with input, output, test_data, expected keys

        # 1. Setup sample directory in tmp_path
        sample_dir = tmp_path / "sample"
        sample_dir.mkdir()
        write_csv(sample_dir / "input.csv", case_data["input"])
        write_csv(sample_dir / "output.csv", case_data["output"])
    
        # 2. Write test data
        write_csv(tmp_path / "data.csv", case_data["test_data"])
    
        # 3. Copy run script and set up commands
        # Note: Generation runs from workspace with absolute paths for sample/output
        # Execution runs from tmp_path where the generated module is
        workspace = Path.cwd()
    
        if lang == "python":
            module_name = "dynamic_py_buffer"
            run_script = run_scripts["python"]
            shutil.copy(run_script, tmp_path / "run.py")
            gen_cmd = entrypoint_argv + [
                module_name,
                "--output",
                str(tmp_path),
                "--sample",
                str(sample_dir),
                "--python",

            compile_cmds = []
            run_cmd = ["uv", "run", "run.py", "data.csv"]

            ]
            compile_cmds = []
            run_cmd = ["node", "run.js", "data.csv"]

            module_name = "dynamic_cpp_buffer"

    def run_transform_test(
        entrypoint_argv: list[str],
        case_data: dict[str, Any],
        lang: str,
        tmp_path: Path,
        run_scripts: dict[str, Path],
        gen_timeout: int = 10,
        compile_timeout: int = 60,
        run_timeout: int = 30,
    ) -> None:
        """Run a transform test case.
    
        Args:
            entrypoint_argv: The entrypoint command as argv list
            case_data: Dict with input, output, test_data, expected keys
            lang: Language to test ("python", "javascript", "cpp", or "rust")
            tmp_path: Temporary directory for test files (sample, data, output)
            run_scripts: Dict mapping language to run script path
            gen_timeout: Timeout in seconds for module generation
            compile_timeout: Timeout in seconds for compilation (C++/Rust)
            run_timeout: Timeout in seconds for execution
        """
        # 1. Setup sample directory in tmp_path
        sample_dir = tmp_path / "sample"
        sample_dir.mkdir()
        write_csv(sample_dir / "input.csv", case_data["input"])
        write_csv(sample_dir / "output.csv", case_data["output"])
    
        # 2. Write test data
        write_csv(tmp_path / "data.csv", case_data["test_data"])
    
        # 3. Copy run script and set up commands
        # Note: Generation runs from workspace with absolute paths for sample/output
        # Execution runs from tmp_path where the generated module is
        workspace = Path.cwd()
    
        if lang == "python":
            module_name = "dynamic_py_buffer"
            run_script = run_scripts["python"]
            shutil.copy(run_script, tmp_path / "run.py")
            gen_cmd = entrypoint_argv + [
                module_name,
                "--output",
                str(tmp_path),
                "--sample",
                str(sample_dir),
                "--python",
            ]
            compile_cmds = []
            run_cmd = ["uv", "run", "run.py", "data.csv"]
        elif lang == "javascript":
            module_name = "dynamic_js_buffer"
            run_script = run_scripts["javascript"]
            shutil.copy(run_script, tmp_path / "run.js")
            gen_cmd = entrypoint_argv + [
                module_name,
                "--output",
                str(tmp_path),
                "--sample",
                str(sample_dir),
                "--javascript",
            ]
            compile_cmds = []
            run_cmd = ["node", "run.js", "data.csv"]
        elif lang == "cpp":
            module_name = "dynamic_cpp_buffer"
            run_script = run_scripts["cpp"]
            shutil.copy(run_script, tmp_path / "run.cpp")
            gen_cmd = entrypoint_argv + [
                module_name,
                "--output",
                str(tmp_path),
                "--sample",
                str(sample_dir),
                "--cpp",
            ]
            # Compile: g++ -std=c++17 -I./dynamic_cpp_buffer -o run run.cpp ./dynamic_cpp_buffer/dynamic_preprocessor.cpp
            compile_cmds = [[
                "g++", "-std=c++17",
                "-I./dynamic_cpp_buffer",
                "-o", "run",
                "run.cpp",
                "./dynamic_cpp_buffer/dynamic_preprocessor.cpp",
            ]]
            run_cmd = ["./run", "data.csv"]
        elif lang == "rust":
            module_name = "dynamic_rs_buffer"
            run_script = run_scripts["rust"]
            shutil.copy(run_script, tmp_path / "run.rs")
            gen_cmd = entrypoint_argv + [
                module_name,
                "--output",
                str(tmp_path),
                "--sample",
                str(sample_dir),
                "--rust",
            ]
            # Compile: cargo build --release in the module dir, then rustc
            compile_cmds = [
                ["cargo", "build", "--release"],  # Run in dynamic_rs_buffer subdir
                [
                    "rustc", "--edition", "2021",
                    "--extern", "dynamic_rs_buffer=dynamic_rs_buffer/target/release/libdynamic_rs_buffer.rlib",
                    "-L", "dynamic_rs_buffer/target/release/deps",
                    "-o", "run",
                    "run.rs",
                ],
            ]
            run_cmd = ["./run", "data.csv"]
        else:
            raise ValueError(f"Unsupported language: {lang}")
    
        # 4. Generate module (run from workspace where submission code lives)
        try:
            gen_result = subprocess.run(
                gen_cmd,
                cwd=workspace,
                capture_output=True,
                text=True,
                timeout=gen_timeout,
            )
        except subprocess.TimeoutExpired:
            pytest.fail(f"TIMEOUT (generation): exceeded {gen_timeout}s - {' '.join(gen_cmd)}")

gen_timeout = 10, compile_timeout = 60, run_timeout = 30

    def run_transform_test(
        entrypoint_argv: list[str],
        case_data: dict[str, Any],
        lang: str,
        tmp_path: Path,
        run_scripts: dict[str, Path],
        gen_timeout: int = 10,
        compile_timeout: int = 60,
        run_timeout: int = 30,
    ) -> None:
        """Run a transform test case.
    
        Args:
            entrypoint_argv: The entrypoint command as argv list
            case_data: Dict with input, output, test_data, expected keys
            lang: Language to test ("python", "javascript", "cpp", or "rust")
            tmp_path: Temporary directory for test files (sample, data, output)
            run_scripts: Dict mapping language to run script path
            gen_timeout: Timeout in seconds for module generation
            compile_timeout: Timeout in seconds for compilation (C++/Rust)
            run_timeout: Timeout in seconds for execution
        """
        # 1. Setup sample directory in tmp_path
        sample_dir = tmp_path / "sample"
        sample_dir.mkdir()
        write_csv(sample_dir / "input.csv", case_data["input"])
        write_csv(sample_dir / "output.csv", case_data["output"])
    
        # 2. Write test data
        write_csv(tmp_path / "data.csv", case_data["test_data"])
    
        # 3. Copy run script and set up commands
        # Note: Generation runs from workspace with absolute paths for sample/output
        # Execution runs from tmp_path where the generated module is
        workspace = Path.cwd()
    
        if lang == "python":
            module_name = "dynamic_py_buffer"
            run_script = run_scripts["python"]
            shutil.copy(run_script, tmp_path / "run.py")
            gen_cmd = entrypoint_argv + [
                module_name,
                "--output",
                str(tmp_path),
                "--sample",
                str(sample_dir),
                "--python",
            ]
            compile_cmds = []
            run_cmd = ["uv", "run", "run.py", "data.csv"]
        elif lang == "javascript":
            module_name = "dynamic_js_buffer"
            run_script = run_scripts["javascript"]
            shutil.copy(run_script, tmp_path / "run.js")
            gen_cmd = entrypoint_argv + [
                module_name,
                "--output",
                str(tmp_path),
                "--sample",
                str(sample_dir),
                "--javascript",
            ]
            compile_cmds = []
            run_cmd = ["node", "run.js", "data.csv"]
        elif lang == "cpp":
            module_name = "dynamic_cpp_buffer"
            run_script = run_scripts["cpp"]
            shutil.copy(run_script, tmp_path / "run.cpp")
            gen_cmd = entrypoint_argv + [
                module_name,
                "--output",
                str(tmp_path),
                "--sample",
                str(sample_dir),
                "--cpp",
            ]
            # Compile: g++ -std=c++17 -I./dynamic_cpp_buffer -o run run.cpp ./dynamic_cpp_buffer/dynamic_preprocessor.cpp
            compile_cmds = [[
                "g++", "-std=c++17",
                "-I./dynamic_cpp_buffer",
                "-o", "run",
                "run.cpp",
                "./dynamic_cpp_buffer/dynamic_preprocessor.cpp",
            ]]
            run_cmd = ["./run", "data.csv"]
        elif lang == "rust":
            module_name = "dynamic_rs_buffer"
            run_script = run_scripts["rust"]
            shutil.copy(run_script, tmp_path / "run.rs")
            gen_cmd = entrypoint_argv + [
                module_name,
                "--output",
                str(tmp_path),
                "--sample",
                str(sample_dir),
                "--rust",
            ]
            # Compile: cargo build --release in the module dir, then rustc
            compile_cmds = [
                ["cargo", "build", "--release"],  # Run in dynamic_rs_buffer subdir
                [
                    "rustc", "--edition", "2021",
                    "--extern", "dynamic_rs_buffer=dynamic_rs_buffer/target/release/libdynamic_rs_buffer.rlib",
                    "-L", "dynamic_rs_buffer/target/release/deps",
                    "-o", "run",
                    "run.rs",
                ],
            ]
            run_cmd = ["./run", "data.csv"]
        else:
            raise ValueError(f"Unsupported language: {lang}")
    
        # 4. Generate module (run from workspace where submission code lives)
        try:
            gen_result = subprocess.run(
                gen_cmd,
                cwd=workspace,
                capture_output=True,
                text=True,
                timeout=gen_timeout,
            )
        except subprocess.TimeoutExpired:
            pytest.fail(f"TIMEOUT (generation): exceeded {gen_timeout}s - {' '.join(gen_cmd)}")

    def run_transform_test(
        entrypoint_argv: list[str],
        case_data: dict[str, Any],
        lang: str,
        tmp_path: Path,
        run_scripts: dict[str, Path],
        gen_timeout: int = 10,
        compile_timeout: int = 60,
        run_timeout: int = 30,
    ) -> None:
        """Run a transform test case.
    
        Args:
            entrypoint_argv: The entrypoint command as argv list
            case_data: Dict with input, output, test_data, expected keys
            lang: Language to test ("python", "javascript", "cpp", or "rust")
            tmp_path: Temporary directory for test files (sample, data, output)
            run_scripts: Dict mapping language to run script path
            gen_timeout: Timeout in seconds for module generation
            compile_timeout: Timeout in seconds for compilation (C++/Rust)
            run_timeout: Timeout in seconds for execution
        """
        # 1. Setup sample directory in tmp_path
        sample_dir = tmp_path / "sample"
        sample_dir.mkdir()
        write_csv(sample_dir / "input.csv", case_data["input"])
        write_csv(sample_dir / "output.csv", case_data["output"])
    
        # 2. Write test data
        write_csv(tmp_path / "data.csv", case_data["test_data"])
    
        # 3. Copy run script and set up commands
        # Note: Generation runs from workspace with absolute paths for sample/output
        # Execution runs from tmp_path where the generated module is
        workspace = Path.cwd()
    
        if lang == "python":
            module_name = "dynamic_py_buffer"
            run_script = run_scripts["python"]
            shutil.copy(run_script, tmp_path / "run.py")
            gen_cmd = entrypoint_argv + [
                module_name,
                "--output",
                str(tmp_path),
                "--sample",
                str(sample_dir),
                "--python",
            ]
            compile_cmds = []
            run_cmd = ["uv", "run", "run.py", "data.csv"]
        elif lang == "javascript":
            module_name = "dynamic_js_buffer"
            run_script = run_scripts["javascript"]
            shutil.copy(run_script, tmp_path / "run.js")
            gen_cmd = entrypoint_argv + [
                module_name,
                "--output",
                str(tmp_path),
                "--sample",
                str(sample_dir),
                "--javascript",
            ]
            compile_cmds = []
            run_cmd = ["node", "run.js", "data.csv"]
        elif lang == "cpp":
            module_name = "dynamic_cpp_buffer"
            run_script = run_scripts["cpp"]
            shutil.copy(run_script, tmp_path / "run.cpp")
            gen_cmd = entrypoint_argv + [
                module_name,
                "--output",
                str(tmp_path),
                "--sample",
                str(sample_dir),
                "--cpp",
            ]
            # Compile: g++ -std=c++17 -I./dynamic_cpp_buffer -o run run.cpp ./dynamic_cpp_buffer/dynamic_preprocessor.cpp
            compile_cmds = [[
                "g++", "-std=c++17",
                "-I./dynamic_cpp_buffer",
                "-o", "run",
                "run.cpp",
                "./dynamic_cpp_buffer/dynamic_preprocessor.cpp",
            ]]
            run_cmd = ["./run", "data.csv"]
        elif lang == "rust":
            module_name = "dynamic_rs_buffer"
            run_script = run_scripts["rust"]
            shutil.copy(run_script, tmp_path / "run.rs")
            gen_cmd = entrypoint_argv + [
                module_name,
                "--output",
                str(tmp_path),
                "--sample",
                str(sample_dir),
                "--rust",
            ]
            # Compile: cargo build --release in the module dir, then rustc
            compile_cmds = [
                ["cargo", "build", "--release"],  # Run in dynamic_rs_buffer subdir
                [
                    "rustc", "--edition", "2021",
                    "--extern", "dynamic_rs_buffer=dynamic_rs_buffer/target/release/libdynamic_rs_buffer.rlib",
                    "-L", "dynamic_rs_buffer/target/release/deps",
                    "-o", "run",
                    "run.rs",
                ],
            ]
            run_cmd = ["./run", "data.csv"]
        else:
            raise ValueError(f"Unsupported language: {lang}")
    
        # 4. Generate module (run from workspace where submission code lives)
        try:
            gen_result = subprocess.run(
                gen_cmd,
                cwd=workspace,
                capture_output=True,
                text=True,
                timeout=gen_timeout,
            )
        except subprocess.TimeoutExpired:
            pytest.fail(f"TIMEOUT (generation): exceeded {gen_timeout}s - {' '.join(gen_cmd)}")

        tmp_path: Path,
        run_scripts: dict[str, Path],
        gen_timeout: int = 10,
        compile_timeout: int = 60,
        run_timeout: int = 30,
    ) -> None:
        """Run a transform test case.
    
        Args:
            entrypoint_argv: The entrypoint command as argv list
            case_data: Dict with input, output, test_data, expected keys
            lang: Language to test ("python", "javascript", "cpp", or "rust")
            tmp_path: Temporary directory for test files (sample, data, output)
            run_scripts: Dict mapping language to run script path
            gen_timeout: Timeout in seconds for module generation
            compile_timeout: Timeout in seconds for compilation (C++/Rust)
            run_timeout: Timeout in seconds for execution

        sample_dir = tmp_path / "sample"

        write_csv(sample_dir / "output.csv", case_data["output"])

            module_name = "dynamic_py_buffer"
            run_script = run_scripts["python"]
